description: Baseline Electron knowledge base with minimal harness

features.name: Window Launch
features.description: Electron app opens a BrowserWindow with correct dimensions and preload script
features.evidence: npm run dev launches window at 1200x800 with contextIsolation=true and nodeIntegration=false

features.name: Document List Panel
features.description: Left sidebar shows imported documents with empty state message
features.evidence: DocumentList component renders empty state when no documents, shows document cards when data present

features.name: Question Panel
features.description: Bottom input bar accepts questions and submits via IPC
features.evidence: QuestionPanel renders text input and Ask button, submits to window.knowledgeBase.qa.ask on Enter or click

features.name: Data Directory
features.description: PersistenceService creates and manages userData/knowledge-base-data directory
features.evidence: PersistenceService constructor calls ensureDirectories() creating data, documents, and index subdirectories
